title: R1' Agent-facing MCP Contract (C1 SSoT)
description: Single source of truth for every tool the coding-agent calls. Providers: cks (code-knowledge-system), chainbench, jira-gateway. ckv/ckg are dev-only and intentionally NOT in this contract. Each provider's conformance test validates its registered tools against this file; coding-agent's contract/lint-tool-names.sh asserts every mcp__server__tool reference in the agent/command prompts is a tool name listed here.

cks.context.get_for_task.description: Compose a budgeted evidence pack for a development task (the primary planning entrypoint): intent -> semantic -> keyword/graph -> budget -> sanitize.

cks.context.semantic_search.description: Vector (meaning) search over the indexed corpus. Hits carry source=ckv.

cks.context.search_text.description: BM25 keyword (exactness) search over the indexed corpus. Hits carry source=ckg.

cks.context.find_symbol.description: Resolve a symbol name to its definition citation(s).

cks.context.find_callers.description: List the callers of a symbol (reverse call edges).

cks.context.find_callees.description: List the callees of a symbol (forward call edges).

cks.context.get_subgraph.description: Return all nodes/edges within depth hops of a symbol, all edge types.

cks.context.impact_analysis.description: Reverse-dependency closure of a symbol, grouped by coupling category (callers/interface/type_users/distributed/concurrent/other).

cks.context.concurrency_impact.description: Concurrency blast radius of a symbol: goroutines/channels/locks it spawns/sends-to/acquires and modules reached over concurrency edges, both directions.

cks.context.change_history.description: PR refs (provenance) and/or BM25-ranked hunk evidence for a symbol or intent.

cks.ops.health.description: Backend reachability + version pins. Reports degraded when ckv (embedder) is unavailable.

cks.ops.freshness.description: Index-vs-HEAD staleness: indexed head, current head, changed files.

cks.ops.index.description: Refresh the ckv + ckg indexes (maintenance op). mode=incremental|full.

chainbench_init.description: Initialize a local go-stablenet network from a profile (genesis + TOML + datadirs).

chainbench_start.description: Start all chain nodes of an initialized network.

chainbench_status.description: Per-node block height, peers, running state, and consensus health.

chainbench_test_run.description: Run a built-in test by 'category/name' (e.g. basic/consensus, basic/tx-send).

chainbench_report.description: Test results report. With format=json returns the C4 loop-back shape parsed for summary.failed.

chainbench_failure_context.description: Most recent failure context snapshot (per-node height, peers, syncing, log tails).

chainbench_stop.description: Stop all running chain nodes gracefully (local network only).

jira_read_ticket.description: Read a Jira ticket. Returns fields + _filter_metadata.scan_result (CLEAN/REDACTED/BLOCKED).

jira_add_comment.description: Add a comment to a ticket.
